## Description
Describe the changes introduced by this Pull Request, including the rationale, goals, and any relevant context.

## Related Issues
Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change
Please mark options that apply:
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Quality improvement (refactoring, linting, formatting, or documentation)

## How Has This Been Tested?
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes:
- [ ] Backend Pytest Suite
- [ ] Frontend Vitest Suite
- [ ] Playwright E2E Verification
- [ ] Manual check of build compile

## Checklist:
- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have updated the documentation / README accordingly
